subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending the recognition of all created things and the comprehension of all beings, befitteth the sacred court of nearness unto the Most Holy Presence of the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از عرفان ممکنات و ادراک کائنات بساط قرب قدس حضرت مقصودیرا لایق که
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the power of words; of speech, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul
